data.title: Quantum Computing Stock Rigetti's Momentum Spikes As Investors Look Past Q4 Revenue Miss
data.description: Despite falling short of analyst expectations with fourth-quarter revenue of $1.87 million as opposed to the consensus estimate of $2.34 million, Rigetti Computing Inc. (NASDAQ: RGTI) is experiencing a surge in market enthusiasm. The company's momentum score jumped from 84.04 to 91.90 week-on-week, ranking them in the top 10% of stocks for relative price strength. Investors seem more focused on technical achievements, as Rigetti announced a significant breakthrough achieving 99.9% two-qubit gate fidelity at a 28-nanosecond gate speed. This milestone is crucial for entanglement and enhances Rigetti's superconducting architecture.

data.title: Capital Clean Energy Q4 Earnings Assessment
data.description: On Thursday, March 5, 2026, Capital Clean Energy (NASDAQ: CCEC) revealed its Q4 earnings at 07:00 AM. The company surpassed estimated earnings by 14.29%, reporting an EPS of $0.48 compared to the expected $0.42. data.title: Bioventus Earnings Report: Q4 Overview
data.description: Bioventus, traded on NASDAQ under BVS, released its Q4 earnings on March 5, 2026, at 07:30 AM. The report showed strong performance as they surpassed earnings estimates by 9.09% with an EPS of $0.24, beating the expected $0.22. Revenue saw a significant increase of $4.26 million compared to the previous year. This positive trend follows their previous quarter, where they exceeded EPS expectations by $0.03, resulting in a 2.25% decrease. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Syntax Data Announces Saidee™, Exclusive AI Agent and Portfolio Development Application
data.description: A prominent financial data and technology company, Syntax Data, introduced its advanced AI agent and portfolio development application, Saidee™, in New York. Saidee™ is tailored to enhance the capabilities of financial advisors by facilitating the effortless generation, continuous supervision, and promotional backing of individualized, rules-based portfolios and indices. Syntax Data has made the application accessible to the RIA community through its exclusive index creation platform, Syntax Direct™. Saidee™ aims to empower financial advisors with a comprehensive tool to efficiently manage portfolios.

data.title: Everspin Advances High-Reliability xSPI MRAM Portfolio With 256Mb Density and Production Qualification Milestones
data.description: Everspin Technologies, Inc. announced significant advancements in its high-reliability PERSYST xSPI STT-MRAM product line. The company, a key player in MRAM solutions, achieved full production qualification for its 64Mb MRAM and introduced a new 256Mb option. The HR 64Mb xSPI STT-MRAM successfully completed full production qualification, showcasing progress in memory technology. This development highlights Everspin's commitment to innovation and expansion within the MRAM market.

data.title: Ambiq Reveals 12nm SPOT® Platform Enabling Operation Down to 300mV for Atomiq™
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Ambiq Micro, Inc. disclosed details about its upcoming Atomiq™ SoC, a product focused on ultra-low-power semiconductor solutions for edge AI. The SoC is developed on Ambiq's latest 12nm SPOT® platform utilizing the TSMC N12e® process. Atomiq features a novel Ultra-Low-Power (ULP) mode designed to function at voltages as low as 300mV, the lowest in Ambiq's history. This announcement signifies the inaugural use of SPOT on a FinFET node, setting a milestone in the industry.

data.title: Victoria’s Secret & Co. Reports 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
data.description: Reynoldsburg, OH - On March 5, 2026, Victoria's Secret & Co. (VSCO) shared their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluded on January 31, 2026. The Company is traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol VSCO.

data.title: Tango Therapeutics Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Highlights
data.description: In 2026, preliminary results from the Phase 1/2 trial of vopimetostat combined with Revolution Medicines' RAS(ON) inhibitors in MTAP-deleted pancreatic cancer showed promising outcomes. The trial continues to attract a significant number of patients, indicating strong participation and interest in this novel treatment approach.

data.title: Invivyd Appoints Distinguished Physician and Scientist, Michael Mina, M.D., Ph.D. as Chief Medical Officer
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in New Haven, Connecticut, Invivyd, Inc. (Nasdaq: IVVD) revealed the selection of Dr. Michael Mina, M.D., Ph.D., as their Chief Medical Officer.

data.title: GH Research Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: Dublin-based GH Research PLC (Nasdaq: GHRS) announced their financial results for the year ending on December 31, 2025. The company, focused on developing innovative treatments for depression, disclosed their annual report today. GH Research PLC is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company aiming to revolutionize patient care.

data.title: Erasca and Tango Therapeutics Enter into Clinical Collaboration to Evaluate Combination of ERAS-0015 and Vopimetostat
data.description: A molecular glue known as ERAS-0015, which targets pan-RAS, is set to undergo assessment in combination with the PRMT5 inhibitor vopimetostat. This evaluation aims to explore the potential synergistic effects of the two compounds in combating RAS-related pathways. This research holds promise for developing novel therapeutic strategies for diseases associated with RAS dysregulation.
MediWound's financial results for Q4 and full year 2025 are now available.

data.title: HAYLOU Introduces Flowbuds N55: Reliable Everyday Performance, Made Accessible
data.description: Hong Kong-based company HAYLOU has recently launched the True Wireless Flowbuds N55, aimed at providing users with a dependable option for their everyday listening needs.

data.title: OneSpaWorld Appoints Ilana Craig Alberico as Vice President of Business Development & Strategy – Resort Spa Operations
data.description: In the Bahamas, OneSpaWorld Holdings Limited (OSW) welcomed Ilana Craig Alberico as the Vice President of Business Development & Strategy for Resort Spa Operations. OneSpaWorld, a leading global provider of health and wellness services on cruise ships and at resorts worldwide, made the announcement. The newly created role will leverage Ms. Alberico's expertise in spa development and operations. OneSpaWorld operates across numerous destinations and is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OSW.
